15mte hose
Great quality and is a real upgrade from original

John Whitehouse 
01/28/2026 

[ ![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0581/9301/9054/files/1_3_70x70.png?v=1751744612) Short Stubby High Pressure washer Gun with Adapter & Nozzles

Connector for short gun

[ ![image](https://cdn.shopify.com/s/files/1/0581/9301/9054/files/Screenshot_2026-01-02_at_16.41.12_70x70.png?v=1767372384) Hose Connector - M22-14mm Karcher Attachment 
](/products/karcher-attachment#judgeme_product_reviews) 

Good product
Well made, quality materials, easy to assemble.Used with Bilt Hamber touch less. So not the most foaming product on the market. However even when running the dilution at the minimum recommended by Bilt Hamber, the foam cannon ( not set on max either) produced a really good quality foam. Very impressive results for the price point.

Ian Richards 
01/26/2026

01/26/2026

01/21/2026

## Product information



















A MUST BEFORE EVERY QUARTZ COATING**

Q2M Prep is a necessary supplement for preparing a vehicle for coating application. It allows the elimination of any oily residues, thus creating a smooth, antistatic surface.

**STRONG DEGREASING PROPERTIES**

Q2M Prep has strong cleansing and degreasing properties owing to which the preparation of the vehicle for any detailing activities becomes much easier and more efficient.

**LIFTING AND DISSOLVING RESIDUE ON AUTOMOTIVE FINISHES**

In contrast to other degreasers available on the market, it not only lifts oily substances and residues of paste or old wax, but is also very capable of solving them, hence their elimination becomes much easier.

**ADVANTAGES:**

- Amazing antistatic properties

- Irreplaceable at preparation for vehicle’s detailing

- High quality degreaser

- Lifts up oily substances and paste/wax residues

- Suitable for all types of surfaces

- By repelling deposited dust Q2M Prep facilitates the detailing process

**ADVICE ON APPLICATION:**

- When applying, use a soft microfiber towel, preferably with antistatic properties.

**PRECAUTIONS:**

- Keep out of reach of children.

- Seek medical attention if swallowed.

- As of August 2018, GYEON Q2M Prep will have a stronger smell. This is due to a formula change to meet new EU guidelines. The product is marginally stronger, so you'll see better results, too.

**Bottle Size:** 500ml or 1L

### About Gyeon











Gyeon is a Korean detailing brand that is global leader in high-end car care products, known for their innovative and durable ceramic coatings. They prioritize quality and advanced technology, constantly pushing the boundaries of automotive protection. With a focus on research and development, GYEON delivers solutions that superior quality but also very easy to use making it the go to for professionals and enthusiasts.









### Why gyeon












- **Cutting-Edge Technology**: Gyeon is a pioneer in the car care industry, introducing the world's first ceramic coating based on fluoro-modified polysilazanes. This ensures superior durability, hydrophobicity, and self-cleaning properties, providing long-lasting protection in just one layer​.
- **Comprehensive Product Range**: Gyeon offers an advanced ceramic-based product line, catering to both car care enthusiasts and professional detailers. Their Q² collection includes coatings, maintenance solutions, and accessories, covering every surface from paint to fabric, ensuring a complete care system for vehicles.
- **Industry Leadership in Paint Protection Films (PPF)**: Gyeon is the first brand globally to offer state-of-the-art self-healing paint protection films, complemented by dedicated ceramic coatings and maintenance products. This makes Gyeon a leader in providing uncompromised paint protection
